title: 5 ways a godly man governs himself
caption:
The private man is the real man.

Most men try to govern their reputation, their image, their relationships — and let the private battles run unchecked. The phone at 6 AM. The second glance. The text sent angry.

What you govern when no one's watching is what you actually are.

Paul didn't say 'try harder.' He said 'I discipline my body and keep it under control.' — 1 Corinthians 9:27.

Not occasionally. Every day. Before breakfast. In the choices nobody else sees.

This week, pick one of the five and run it hard.

—

Comment "govern" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

#ethos #christianmen #faithoverfear #godlymen #manofgod #selfdiscipline #masculinity #selfcontrol #christianity #scripture
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
